|desc={{p|Blastoise}} is Siebold's only known Pokémon. He used it to battle [[Alain]] and his [[Mega Evolution|Mega]] {{TP|Alain|Charizard}} X. During the battle, Blastoise was shown to be very powerful, defeating Charizard without too much trouble, although Charizard put up a good fight nonetheless.

In the animated series, it appeared in a flashback in ''[[XY133|Coming Apart at the Dreams!]]''.

Blastoise's known moves are {{m|Hydro Pump}}, {{m|Skull Bash}}, {{m|Dragon Pulse}}, and {{m|Power-Up Punch}}, and its [[Ability]] is {{a|Mega Launcher}} as a Mega Blastoise.}}
